summary: I inspected the codebase to ground my questions: the "Dashboard" is the app root (`home#index`), currently a titled placeholder, and the ask wants it built out "similar to the current Pipelines view" (`pipelines#index`, a per-user table of Title/Project/Status/Phase/Created). Since no draft-requirements artifact was provided (empty inputs), I worked from the ask plus what the app actually contains — pipelines, phase gates/approvals, workers, step runs. I wrote nine numbered open questions to `output/open_questions.md`, each focused on a decision only the requester can settle (whether the Dashboard summarizes vs. duplicates the Pipelines table, data scope, which "at-a-glance" metrics, whether to surface gate items needing human action, worker-health depth, live vs. on-load updates, the "recent" window, empty-state behavior, and whether to keep the root route/nav as-is), and each records the sensible default I'll assume if the human doesn't weigh in at the gate.
